data.name: Hentai World Office
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a soothing and magical puzzle adventure where every finished level reveals captivating portraits of lovely girls. Soft background melodies set a peaceful tone as you carefully swap and position tiles to bring each image to life, one piece at a time.

Move through the game at your own rhythm with no countdowns, enjoying the satisfying flow of progressing into more complex puzzles. Whether you’re a casual player or a puzzle enthusiast, this experience combines relaxation, charm, and mesmerizing visuals.

Features:

Discover gorgeous and enticing girl images as you clear each stage.

Immerse yourself in gentle background music that enhances the atmosphere.

View your completed pictures in full-screen mode.

Tackle puzzles that gradually rise in difficulty.

No time limits — unwind, play freely, and enjoy every moment.

data.short_description: Enjoy a calm puzzle experience where you match tiles to reveal captivating girl images. Relax with gentle music, rising difficulty, and no time limits—play freely at your own pace.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
